overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing an FBI agent exploring a dark forest at night with a flashlight. The character discovers and loots a supply stash before continuing through the woods as rain begins to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail illuminated by flashlight

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the dark forest, sweeping flashlight across trees and undergrowth

entered.detail: tall trees forming a dark canopy overhead
narrow dirt trail winding through the trees
green ferns lining the path sides
red-topped metal supply box partially hidden by vegetation

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest trail at night, with the camera following an FBI agent from behind. The flashlight illuminates dense vegetation and ferns along a narrow dirt path, revealing a metal supply box ahead as the character approaches.

events.description: character opens the metal supply box lid
character retrieves items from inside the stash box

agents.ego_description: kneeling to open the supply stash and retrieving items from inside

segments.scene_description: The character stops to interact with the discovered supply box, opening the lid and retrieving items while the camera remains focused on the container. The surrounding forest remains dark and still during the looting interaction.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy forest path with rocky terrain

events.description: rain begins falling, becoming visible in the flashlight beam

agents.ego_description: continuing through the forest as rain starts, navigating around rocks and trees

entered.detail: tall straight tree trunk visible in the flashlight beam
large boulders and rocky outcrops along the path edge

segments.scene_description: Leaving the supply box behind, the character continues deeper into the woods, passing large tree trunks and rocky formations. Rain begins to fall around the midpoint of the segment, visible as streaks in the flashlight beam while the agent presses forward through the increasingly wet forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark forest that shifts from a still, nocturnal trek to a rain-soaked journey. It begins by following an FBI agent from behind along a narrow dirt path, where a flashlight cuts through dense vegetation and ferns to reveal a metal supply box. As the character stops to interact with the container, the camera focuses on the looting process while the surrounding woods remain dark and silent. The scene then shifts as the agent leaves the stash behind and presses deeper into the wilderness, passing large tree trunks and rocky formations. Finally, the environment transforms as rain begins to fall, appearing as streaks within the flashlight beam while the character moves through the increasingly wet forest.
